title: John Dory’s George turns 10 with a splashy new look
description: BUSINESS NEWS - John Dory’s George is...
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - John Dory’s George is charting exciting new waters with a bold interior revamp – perfectly timed to celebrate 10 years of flavour, family, and seaside fun in the heart of the Garden Route. This refreshed space invites diners to rediscover the magic of the ocean with every visit.


> Anchored in calming neutral tones of sand and stone, the new design brings waves of energy through pops of ocean blues and warm sunset oranges.


From playful shoal-inspired light fixtures to dramatic fish murals that seem to swim across the walls, every detail tells a story – one of exploration, sustainability, and the deep connection between sea and table.

The upgraded children’s play area is an adventure in itself, designed for discovery and fun, while parents relax nearby. And the signature marine theme? It’s still at the heart of it all – just with a modern twist that reflects John Dory’s growing legacy.


> Gallery: A splashy new look


For a decade, John Dory’s George has been the go-to for delicious, responsibly sourced seafood and sushi. Now, with this fresh new look, it’s ready to delight a new generation of ocean lovers, adventurers, and flavour seekers. Dive in – your next discovery awaits.

"Gary, PJ, and the entire crew are thrilled to welcome you back!"

Email [email protected]

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
